caption: A screen capture shows a split-screen view featuring a giveaway list from RANDOM.ORG on the left and a live stream chat and video feed on the right. The left side lists numbered names, including "11. Michael Loguericio" and "12. Carl Hagedorn," and displays the IP address "IP: 47.144.180.205" and a timestamp of "2023-05-20 03:13:04 UTC." The chat window on the right contains messages from "glowbug27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://zb.nz/Zge8S4Y". Below the chat, a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt is visible in a video feed, with a "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" logo overlaying the bottom of his image. The scene remains static across the frames, with no visible movement or changes in the text or the man's expression.
